---
species: "Crassostrea virginica"
accepted_code: "CRVI"
alternate_codes: ""
diminutive: ""
alternate_diminutives: ""
common_name: "Eastern Oyster"
field_id_possible:
  - yes
description: "Elongate with a mild curve, can grow to be massive"
image: '/header_images/'
image_credit: 'Photo by Yolanda Villacampa via [NMNH](http://n2t.net/ark:/65665/m3cb27e6c0-d13d-43e8-9706-e59d071454b0)' 
categories:
  - bivalves
sampling_programs:
    - keen_upc
    - bhi_quadrat
    - bhi_rov
    - bhi_bruv
    - bhi_farms
habitat:
  - intertidal
  - subtidal
  - marsh
mobility:
  - sessile
sampling_region:
  - GOM
  - Virginian
catami_code: "23000000"
catami_version: "1.4"
worms_code: "140657"
---


**Other images:** <!-- Other images with attribution -->
<br/>

**Distinguishing features:** 
<!-- size, gross morphology, a key identifier, zonation notes (intertidal or depth) -->
<br/>

**Easily confused species and differentiation:** 

<br/>

**Extended Description:** <!-- Extended description -->

<!-- link to worms page -->
